text:
From: Procurement Lead

We must choose exactly one vendor for the 12-month support contract. The budget cap is $120,000. The chosen vendor must guarantee a response time under 4 hours and provide on-site support at least quarterly.

Vendor A — Price $110,000; guaranteed response 3 hours; on-site visits monthly.
Vendor B — Price $98,000; guaranteed response 5 hours; on-site visits quarterly.
Vendor C — Price $125,000; guaranteed response 2 hours; on-site visits monthly.

Finance: any proposal exceeding the budget cap is automatically disqualified, regardless of other merits.
Operations: response time is twice as important to us as on-site visit frequency.
